title: Growth in net profit, Krom Bank to focus on capital strengthening and synergy with Kredivo
body: PT Krom Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBSI) booked net profit of IDR 107.13 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024, up 9.54% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Working with limited capital, PBRX anticipates sales decline
body: PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) is anticipating decline in its sales number in 2025 following its limited working capital. Its total equity was reported at USD 333.60 million as of Q3 2024, relatively stable compared to the same period in 2023.

title: A year in the stock market, UDNG saw 52% decrease
body: A year into its debut in the stock exchange, the stock performance of PT Agro Bahari Nusantara Tbk (UDNG) plummeted 52% as of yesterday’s (6/11) closing bell.

title: State sukuk auction reported incoming bids of IDR 16.26 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Tuesday (5/11) reportedly reached IDR 16.26 trillion.

title: Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi to offer IPO shares for IDR 107 each
body: PT Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi Tbk (NAIK), an issuer that is engaged in the fire protection system sales, has set the initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 107 per share.

title: Growth in net profit, Krom Bank to focus on capital strengthening and synergy with Kredivo
body: PT Krom Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBSI) booked net profit of IDR 107.13 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024, up 9.54% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Working with limited capital, PBRX anticipates sales decline
body: PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) is anticipating decline in its sales number in 2025 following its limited working capital. Its total equity was reported at USD 333.60 million as of Q3 2024, relatively stable compared to the same period in 2023.

title: A year in the stock market, UDNG saw 52% decrease
body: A year into its debut in the stock exchange, the stock performance of PT Agro Bahari Nusantara Tbk (UDNG) plummeted 52% as of yesterday’s (6/11) closing bell.

title: State sukuk auction reported incoming bids of IDR 16.26 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Tuesday (5/11) reportedly reached IDR 16.26 trillion.

title: Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi to offer IPO shares for IDR 107 each
body: PT Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi Tbk (NAIK), an issuer that is engaged in the fire protection system sales, has set the initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 107 per share.

title: Profit soared, MPXL lowers interim dividend
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL) will allocate IDR 1.5 billion for its interim dividend in the fiscal year (FY) 2024, which will be disbursed next December.

title: Donald Trump secures presidency in US Election 2024
body: Donald Trump is confirmed as the 47th Elected President of the United States of America (USA) after securing the highest electoral votes.

title: PTRO is all set for mining service contract worth IDR 4 trillion
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO), a construction and mining service provider company, signed a mining service agreement term sheet between PT Niaga Jasa Dunia (NJD) and PT Bara Prima Mandiri (BPM) last Tuesday (5/11).

title: JCI saw decrease throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) saw a decline throughout the day on Wednesday (6/11).

title: FAP Agri announces another buyback plan
body: PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA) is reportedly planning another buyback of a maximum of 292,2 million shares, following its last buyback period that will end on December 21, 2024.

title: Impack Pratama to put in extra IDR 79.9 billion for plastic manufacturing business
body: PT Impack Pratama Tbk (IMPC), a manufacturer of plastic building materials, has channelled extra capital worth IDR 79.9 billion to one of its subsidiaries engaged in the plastic manufacturing business line, PT Sirkular Karya Indonesia (SKI).

title: Remaining in green zone, net foreign volume closed at 334.02 million shares
body: Net foreign volume on Tuesday, November 5, stayed in the green zone following the previous day, closing at 334.02 million shares. This number represents the difference between foreign buying volume (3.78 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (3.44 billion shares). The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely around 1.07 billion shares, with a net volume of 76.56 million shares.

title: SCMA to issue interim dividend of IDR 5 per share
body: PT Surya Citra Media Tbk (SCMA), a company managing several television channels in Indonesia, namely SCTV and Indosiar, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 5 per share, or a total of IDR 316.85 billion.

title: Flourishing, ASSA to set up its first interim dividend
body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) will distribute interim dividend for the fiscal year 2024, which is its first interim dividend distribution since its debut in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2012.

title: Triputra Agro Persada to set up interim dividend of IDR 1.51 trillion
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG), a palm and rubber plantation company, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 1.51 trillion or IDR 76 per share.

title: MD Entertainment soared 20.8% in 9M 2024
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) recorded net profit of IDR 102.9 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024, up 20.8% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Semen Indonesia’s net profit down 58% in 9M 2024
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR), a cement manufacturer primarily owned by the Indonesian government, booked net profit of IDR 719.72 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Makna Prakarsa Utama takes over 73% of Mitra Tirta Buwana (SOUL)
body: PT Mitra Tirta Buwana welcomed PT Makna Prakarsa Utama as a new controller and investor at the beginning of November. The investor bought nearly 730 million shares of the company that makes bottled water under the Hexsoul brand on Friday, November 1. Without hesitation, the new investor gained control of 73.21% of the company right away through the transaction through PT KB Valbury Sekuritas.

title: Sabana Prawirawidjaja invests an additional 1.6 billion shares in Ultrajaya (ULTJ)
body: On Thursday, October 31, Sabana Prawirawidjaja made an additional investment of 1.6 billion shares in PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ). The company's investor, who is also the president of the food and beverage company, increased his stake in ULTJ from 34% to nearly 50%. He used PT Shinhan Sekuritas Indonesia to make the purchase.

title: Foreign share activities increase; net foreign volume closed at 192 million shares
body: On Monday, November 4, foreign investors upped their share purchasing and selling activities from the previous day, with a foreign buying volume of 4.37 billion and a foreign selling volume of 4.17 billion. Those transactions generated a net foreign volume surplus of 192.04 million shares. One factor contributing to the increase in stock transactions is the purchase of 1.92 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a net volume of 147.47 million shares

title: Avia Avian to distribute interim dividend of IDR 11 per share
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a manufacturer of paint and other building materials, will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 11 per share or a maximum of IDR 672.6 billion.

title: Modalku Group secures US$ 100 million credit facility from HSBC
body: Modalku Group pocketed credit facility worth US$ 100 million or equivalent to IDR 1.55 trillion from the HSBC ASEAN Growth Fund.

title: Struggling with loss, Modernland Realty secures USD 60 million loan
body: PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN), a real estate developer and management company, has signed a loan facility agreement worth USD 60 million amidst the current negative financial performance it is facing.

title: Profit soaring 124.51%, MARK to allocate interim dividend of IDR 76 billion
body: PT Mark Dynamics Tbk (MARK) will channel interim dividend of IDR 20 per share, totalling IDR 76 billion, for the fiscal year 2024.

title: Newport Marine Services to set IPO price to IDR 100 per share
body: PT Newport Marine Services Tbk (BOAT), a vessel charter service for offshore oil and gas industry, has set the initial public offering (IPO) price to IDR 100 per share.

title: KLAS to allocate stock dividend with 12:1 ratio
body: PT Pelayaran Kurnia Lautan Semesta Tbk (KLAS), a logistics and shipping company, will distribute stock dividend with a ratio set to 12:1.

title: Penfabric to ready IDR 28.88 billion for CNTX’s tender offer
body: Penfabric Sdn Berhad is allocating IDR 28.88 billion for the tender offer of 72.22 million shares of PT Century Textile Industry Tbk (CNTX) that took place earlier today (4/11).

title: Daaz Bara Lestari sets IPO price to IDR 900 per share
body: PT Daaz Bara Lestari Tbk (DAAZ), a wholesale trading company specialised in metal ores and a holding company, has set the initial public offering (IPO) price to IDR 900 per share.

title: HMI to transfer shares in Gostal Nickel to TGEM Ptd Ltd Singapore
body: PT Trinitan Green Energy Minerals (TGEM) has decided to sell the shares of its subsidiary, PT Hydortech Metal Indonesia (HMI), in PT Gostal Nickel Indonesia (GNI) to TGEM Pt Ltd Singapore for IDR 15.70 billion last week (31/10).

title: Inflation recorded at 1.17% in October 2024
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded inflation in October 2024 at 1.71%, lower than October 2024 at 2.56%.

title: BRI pays bonds worth IDR 2.1 trillion in November
body: This November, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), a state-owned bank, is the first issuer to settle its bond debt. Obligasi Berkelanjutan III Bank BRI Tahap I Tahun 2019 Seri C, worth an incredible IDR 2.17 trillion, will be paid to investors by BRI on November 7. Additionally, this marks the biggest bond payment during this time frame.

title: BRI channelled loan and financing of IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September 2024
body: Loan and financing distribution of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) reportedly grew 8.2% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September (9M) 2024 from IDR 1.25 quadrillion in 9M 2023.

title: Nicke Widyawati to be replaced by Simon Aloysius Mantiri as Pertamina’s Director
body: The State Ministry of State-Owned Enterprise (SOE) has appointed Simon Aloysius Mantiri as President Director of PT Pertamina (Persero), replacing Nicke Widyawati.

title: Budi Starch & Sweetener to distribute interim dividend of IDR 22.49 billion
body: PT Budi Starch & Sweetener Tbk (BUDI), a flour and sugar manufacturer operating under Sungai Budi Group, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 22.49 billion.

title: Gov’t to offer 7 state sukuk series, eyeing IDR 9 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of 7 series of Government Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk next Tuesday (5/11) with an indicative target of IDR 9 trillion.
